title: Delicious Irish Beetroot Gratin
description: A citrusy, fluffy, comforting Irish dish featuring beetroot, lardons, and a hint of orange. Made with vegan-friendly ingredients, this beetroot gratin is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: lardons
ingredients.notes: can be replaced with vegan bacon or omit if vegan-friendly option is not desired

instructions: Sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in a little olive oil until softened.
Add the lardons and cook until crispy, then set aside.
Peel and slice the beetroot, then layer in a greased oven-safe dish with the cooked onion and lardons.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, plant-based milk, nutritional yeast, salt, black pepper, and dried thyme. Pour the mixture over the beetroot layers.
Drizzle with orange juice and sprinkle with orange zest.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the beetroot is tender.
